title: Property Code
Property Type
Description
table-657-657.caption: Show the property type descriptions of properties belonging to that code.
data: Detached residential dwelling designed for one family.
Multi-story residential unit sharing one or more walls with adjacent units.
Individual living unit within a larger residential building, typically rented.
Commercial property primarily used for business operations and professional services.
Commercial space designed for selling goods or services directly to consumers.
Large building used for the storage of goods, materials, or products.
Property suitable for light manufacturing, assembly, or distribution activities.
